prompt_text:
### Demographics: 64-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 3 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class III)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Major Depressive Disorder
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~30 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Olanzapine (10 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 74.1 kg; Height 154.1 cm; BMI 31.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 129/74 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.2%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 9.1%; 3 months ago 8.6%; current 8.6%), FPG (12 months ago 232mg/dL; 9 months ago 269mg/dL; 6 months ago 193mg/dL; 3 months ago 183mg/dL; current 180mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 73.9kg; 9 months ago 74.2kg; 6 months ago 73.2kg; 3 months ago 72.7kg; current 74.1kg), Height (12 months ago 154.1cm; 9 months ago 154.1cm; 6 months ago 154.1cm; 3 months ago 154.1cm; current 154.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 31.0kg/m²; current 31.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 128mmHg; 9 months ago 129mmHg; 6 months ago 128mmHg; 3 months ago 130mmHg; current 129mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 77mmHg; 9 months ago 77mmHg; 6 months ago 74mmHg; 3 months ago 76mmHg; current 74mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 35U/L; 9 months ago 36U/L; 6 months ago 29U/L; 3 months ago 35U/L; current 33U/L), AST (12 months ago 13U/L; 9 months ago 18U/L; 6 months ago 18U/L; 3 months ago 18U/L; current 16U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 9.3mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 5.4mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 7.9mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 5.7mL/min/1.73m²; current 2mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 850mg/g; 9 months ago 911mg/g; 6 months ago 727mg/g; 3 months ago 1047mg/g; current 888mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 87mg/dL; 9 months ago 88mg/dL; 6 months ago 87mg/dL; 3 months ago 84mg/dL; current 85mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 38mg/dL; 9 months ago 39mg/dL; 6 months ago 41mg/dL; 3 months ago 38mg/dL; current 40mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 162mg/dL; 9 months ago 157mg/dL; 6 months ago 178mg/dL; 3 months ago 163mg/dL; current 168mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.4g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 11.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
